auth.usernameSpaceWarning: Usernames can't contain spaces - an underscore works great instead.
auth.usernameInvalid: Use 2-40 letters, numbers, or _ - ' . ` for your username.
auth.dobHelper: You must be at least {{minAge}} to join {{siteName}}.
auth.minorIsolation: Only show me other members under 18 and staff. You can change this later in your settings.
auth.rulesAgreement: I understand {{siteName}} hosts user written stories and roleplay, and some areas are for adults only. I agree to the <1>site rules</1>.
auth.tickBoxTitle: Tick the box to confirm you agree to the house rules.
auth.rulesRequired: Please read and agree to the house rules to register.
auth.dobRequired: Please enter your date of birth.
auth.minAgeError: You must be at least {{minAge}} years old to create an account.
auth.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.profilePrivate: <0>{{name}}</0>'s profile is <2>private</2>. Please sign in or register to view it.
auth.profileView: You're trying to view <1>{{name}}</1>'s profile. Sign in or register to continue.
auth.worldPrivate: <0>{{name}}</0> is a <2>private</2> world. Please sign in or register to view it.
auth.returnForumRegister: You're creating an account on <1>{{siteName}}</1> to access the forum <3>{{forum}}</3>. Once you've registered, we'll take you straight back to it.
auth.returnForumLogin: After you sign in, we'll return you to the forum <1>{{forum}}</1>.
auth.inviteRegister: You're creating an account on <1>{{siteName}}</1> to join <3>{{community}}</3>. Once you've registered, we'll take you straight there.
auth.inviteLogin: After you sign in, we'll take you to <1>{{community}}</1>.

googleFinish.heading: finish your vessel
googleFinish.intro: You're signing in with <1>Google</1>. Pick a username and agree to the house rules to finish creating your account on <3>{{siteName}}</3>.
googleFinish.rulesRequired: Please read and agree to the house rules to finish signing up.

emailPages.resetSent: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link is on its way. It expires in 1 hour. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
emailPages.resetIntro: Enter your account email and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
emailPages.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
emailPages.resetMissingToken: This reset link is missing its token. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
emailPages.passwordChanged: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in with your new password.
emailPages.verifyMissingToken: This confirmation link is missing its token.
emailPages.verifyInvalid: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
emailPages.confirmed: Your email is confirmed. Thanks! You can sign in and start writing.

verifyGate.sendFailed: Couldn't send right now. Try again in a minute.
verifyGate.notYet: Not verified yet — open the link in your email, then try again.
verifyGate.block: <0>Verify your email to chat.</0> Click the link we sent, then <2>{{refreshLabel}}</2>. Don't see it? Check your <4>spam</4> folder, then <6>{{resendLabel}}</6> · <8>wrong email?</8>
verifyGate.nudge: Please verify your email to secure your account. <1>{{resendLabel}}</1>

faqPage.title: FAQ
faqPage.empty: No FAQ entries have been posted yet.
faqPage.notFound: That FAQ entry doesn't exist (or isn't published).

landing.joinBody: This community is brand new, and the writers here now are shaping what it becomes. Join today, bring your characters, and help set the tone for everyone who finds us after you.
landing.reassurance: Free forever. No download, no card. Jump into a room in under a minute.
landing.hostBody: Run your own community: organized room categories with icons, staff-only info rooms whose history never expires, role badges and roles members pick themselves, your world's lore built in, rich text chat, custom emoji & commands, its own economy, and one link that invites your friends straight in. Free to start, right in your browser.
landing.bringBody: Give your game, guild, or fandom a real home, free, with the tools to run it your way.
ownChat: Rich text chat rooms in organized categories with icons
Staff-only info rooms whose history never expires, and role-gated rooms with roles members pick themselves
Your world's lore built in, plus its own economy and cosmetics
One-link invites, custom emoji & commands, and moderation tools you control
ownForums: A moderator team and membership rules
A public page you can share anywhere
Threaded topics that last for weeks
landing.closingBody: Registration takes a minute. Build a character, step into a public room, and start writing tonight.
landing.justBrowsing: Just browsing? <1>Read stories in the Scriptorium</1>, no account needed.
landing.betaLine: {{siteName}} is young and growing fast. Expect new things weekly.

features.heading: Everything Your Story Needs
features.welcome: Welcome, every writer, dreamer, and creature from all walks of life. There's a place for your stories here.
features.introHeading: Play and pick-up games on any device
features.introSummary: The Spire runs right in your browser — no download, no install. Play at your desk and pick up right where you left off on your phone, with the same rooms, characters, and stories on every screen.

characters.title: Characters
characters.tagline: Play a whole cast, not just one face
characters.desc: Create up to 100 distinct characters on a single account, each with their own portrait, bio, stats, and inventory. Switch personas instantly, and join several games in different tabs at once.
points: Up to 100 characters per account
Portraits, bios, stats & inventory
Per-character account management

communities.title: Communities
communities.tagline: Host your own community, or join one
communities.desc: Beyond the native Spire, anyone can run their own community: organized room categories and icons, staff-only info rooms whose history never expires, roles with badges that members pick themselves, your world's lore on your community's page, rich text chat, custom emoji & commands, and its own economy. Run it your way, or join communities other people have built.
points: Room categories with icons, info rooms & role-gated rooms
Rich text chat with custom emoji & commands
One invite link that drops friends right into your rooms
Per-community economy & moderation you control

rooms.title: Live Roleplay
rooms.desc: Write together in open public rooms, or private rooms. Set the scene, and use NPC speakers to bring characters to life. Dice rolls, whispers, emotes, and slash commands keep the scene moving.
points: Public & private password protected rooms
Room descriptions, scenes, and NPC speakers to enrich storytelling
Dice, actions, and whispers commands
Emoticons and emote stickers + custom emotes

worlds.title: Worlds & Wikis
worlds.tagline: Build the setting, not just the scene
worlds.desc: Give your game a permanent home: a world wiki with typed entries for locations, NPCs, items, and factions, a lore page tree, story arcs, and session logs, all cross-linked like a real knowledge base.
points: Typed entries: locations, NPCs, items, factions
Lore pages, story arcs & session logs
Vibe sliders show players what to expect

forums.title: Forums & PBP
forums.tagline: Join or host your own forums here
forums.desc: Join an existing forum hosting Play-by-Post games, or run a forum for your own games, guilds, or fandoms. You get your own boards, a moderator team, and membership rules.
points: Your own boards & moderator roles
Open, application, or invite-only membership
A public page at your own /f/ address

scriptorium.title: The Scriptorium
scriptorium.desc: Post your stories with chapters, content ratings, and reviews in a rich editor built for writers. Readers can shelve your books in their library, and you can even offer paid copies with in-app point currency.
points: Original fiction & fanfiction with chapters
Reviews, ratings & reader libraries
Earn gold, and offer paid copies of your work

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.tagline: A page that is truly yours
profiles.desc: Every character gets a customizable profile page: custom CSS, backgrounds, image galleries, and links. Make it match your character, not a template.
points: Custom HTML, CSS & backgrounds
Image galleries & links
Distinct looks per character
Show off item collections & pets

earning.title: Earning & Rewards
earning.desc: Active writers earn XP, ranks, and currency just by playing. Spend it on cosmetics, name styles, room transitions, and gifts for friends. No decay, no daily chores.
points: XP, ranks & point currency for writing
Shop with collectible items, gifts, throwables, and pets
Customizable Name Styles, Border Frames, and more
No grind required to keep your standing

community.title: Find Your Circle
community.desc: Friends lists, per-character presence, and safety tools like blocking and ignores keep the community healthy. New arrivals get a personal welcome and land in a lively room from their very first visit. Themes from medieval to sci-fi make it feel like home.
points: A personal welcome that lands you in a lively room on day one
Friends & online presence
Blocking, ignore & moderation tools
Light & dark themes for every taste + customize your own

memberRankings.heading: Our roleplayers, front and center
memberRankings.sub: Live rankings straight from the Spire's halls — wealth, words, wins, and the writers behind them.

featuredWorlds.orbSubtitle: scry through the crystal at each realm

popular.heading: Popular {{siteName}} Chat Servers
popular.sub: Places people are already gathering. Take a look inside.

communities.sub: The most active communities in our network. Take a look, and list your own.
communities.emptyRail: No communities listed yet. Be the first to list yours.

board.searchAria: Search communities by name or tag

portal.title: Top RP Communities
portal.intro: List your roleplay community here. Add our link-back to your site, and we'll count visits both ways so everyone can see what's active.
portal.emptyBoard: No communities listed yet. Be the first — hit Add Your Community.
portal.loginToList: Log in to list your community.
portal.ownEntry: You'll own the entry, so you can return anytime to copy your link-back.
portal.noneYet: You haven't listed a community yet.
portal.descPlaceholder: A line or two about your community
portal.tagsHint: Genre or category, so seekers can find you.
portal.pendingNote: Thanks! Your community is pending review. It goes live once a moderator approves it.
portal.linkBackLabel: Your link-back (put this on your site)
portal.editNote: Editing a live listing sends it back for review before it shows again.

topCommunities.emptyBoard: No communities listed yet. Be the first — hit Add Your Site.

splashFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
splashFaq.moreQuestion: Have another question? <1>Read the full FAQ</1>.

seo.defaultDescription: Host your own roleplay chat community or forum, or dive into live RP chat, character profiles, worlds, and collaborative writing.

forum.title: {{name}} - Forum · {{siteName}}
forum.genericDescription: {{name}} is a community forum on {{siteName}}, with boards for play-by-post and discussion.

world.title: {{name}} - Roleplay World · {{siteName}}
world.genericDescription: {{name}} is a roleplay world on {{siteName}}. Lore, places, and characters in one wiki.

community.title: {{name}} - Community · {{siteName}}
community.genericDescription: {{name}} is a roleplay community on {{siteName}}, with its own chat rooms and forums.

login.title: Log in · {{siteName}} - {{tagline}}
login.description: Sign in to {{siteName}} to continue your stories, manage characters, and rejoin your roleplay rooms.

register.title: Create your character · {{siteName}} - {{tagline}}
register.description: Join {{siteName}}. Build a character, step into the worlds, and find your roleplay circle. Free to sign up.

scriptorium.title: Scriptorium - Collaborative Stories · {{siteName}}
scriptorium.description: Read and write collaborative roleplay fiction on {{siteName}}. The Scriptorium hosts open-invite stories, one-shots, and long-form serials from the community.

faqs.title: Help & FAQ · {{siteName}}
faqs.description: Answers to common questions about {{siteName}}: getting started, roleplay chat, characters, communities, forums, and account help.

topCommunities.title: Top Communities · {{siteName}}
topCommunities.description: Discover the top roleplay communities, chat servers, and forums featured on {{siteName}}. Browse the webring and find your next home for RP.

service.name: Community & forum hosting on {{siteName}}
service.description: Create and run your own roleplay chat community or forum on {{siteName}}, with rooms, members, roles, moderation, and a shareable public page.

noscript.intro: {{siteName}} is a home for live, text-based roleplay, and a platform where anyone can host their own community. Join the roleplay, or create your own chat community and forums with your own rooms, members, roles, and moderation.
noscript.body: Step into live roleplay chat rooms, build characters, explore shared worlds, write collaborative stories in the Scriptorium, or host your own community or forum.
noscript.jsNote: This page needs JavaScript enabled for the full experience.
